summary: Queue is structurally sound and correctly ordered. EXP-01 approved with amendments. All GPU experiments HOLD until blocking objections are resolved.

blocking_objections.issue: Colab MCP has never been verified in this phase. colab_session_active=false. EXP-01 must include a connectivity smoke test logging GPU type, VRAM, and session duration.
No executable training command exists. Method manifest has hyperparameters but no script path, seed, checkpoint path, or metric logging destination. Constitution §6 requires exact commands.
Metric-sensitive experiment built on unconfirmed metric. Must confirm metric first via EXP-01 submission feedback.
The 28 test-only species claim is unverified (self-hallucination audit). Cannot build external data pipeline on unlogged claim.

non_blocking_observations.note: EXP-02 macro_auroc >= 0.70 threshold is ungrounded. First run should establish anchor, not hit arbitrary bar.
BEATs 5-hour estimate may exceed single Colab session. Need checkpoint/resume protocol.
EXP-09 lacks full PL logging contract (source checkpoint, confidence threshold, row counts, dataset hash).
EXP-12 has no concrete A100 estimate.
Validation split strategy is unspecified — seed exists but group-aware strategy not documented.
SOTA scores cited without source URLs. Label as unverified.

required_next_actions: Architect amends EXP-01 to resolve BLOCK-01, BLOCK-03, BLOCK-04, and OBS-05.
codex_cli produces concrete training script for EXP-02 (resolves BLOCK-02).
Critic re-reviews after EXP-01 artifacts are logged.
No A100 time authorized until EXP-01 completes and critic gate clears.
